raw_response_text:
<features>
- animal type: cat
- fur pattern: tabby stripes on head and body
- fur color: brown, black, and some white/cream on chest
- eye color: yellow/green
- ear shape: pointed, tufted
- whiskers: long and prominent
</features>
<kb>
- IF [animal type = cat AND fur is long and fluffy AND ears are pointed and tufted] THEN [20]
- IF [animal type = dog AND fur is predominantly white and very fluffy AND tail is curled over back] THEN [29]
- IF [animal type = dog AND fur is short to medium length with large patches of brown/black and white AND face is broad with jowls] THEN [28]
- IF [animal type = dog AND fur is medium to long with a spotted or speckled pattern (roan) AND ears are long and floppy] THEN [13]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The rule for class 20 fires because the Query Image shows an animal that is clearly a cat, with long and fluffy fur, and pointed, tufted ears.
</rule_check>
<response>20</response>

- coat color: predominantly white/cream

- IF [coat is short to medium, white with large brown/black patches, and the face has distinct markings] THEN [28]
- IF [coat is medium to long, white with black spots/patches, and ears are long and floppy] THEN [13]
</kb>
<rule_check>

<response>29</response>

<features>
- fur color: white, brown, and black patches
- fur texture: medium length, somewhat wavy
- ears: floppy, medium length, dark brown/black
- snout: relatively short, dark
- eyes: dark, slightly droopy lower eyelids
- tongue: visible, pink
</features>
<kb>
- IF [fur color = white, brown, and black patches AND ears = floppy AND snout = relatively short] THEN [28]
- IF [fur color = white AND fur texture = very fluffy AND tail = curled over back] THEN [29]
- IF [fur color = various shades of brown/orange/cream AND fur texture = long and fluffy AND ears = pointed or slightly floppy] THEN [20]
- IF [fur color = white with black spots/patches AND ears = floppy AND fur texture = medium length] THEN [13]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The rule for class 28 fires because the Query Image shows a dog with white, brown, and black fur patches, floppy ears, and a relatively short snout, which are all features consistent with the examples of class 28.
</rule_check>
<response>28</response>
